items.hook: The Racecourse of Achilles is a narrow strip of land north-west of Crimea and south of the mouth of the Dnieper in Ukraine, running nearly due west and east.
items.body: It is now divided into two parts called Tendra Spit and Dzharylhach. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: MUBI and BIM join forces on cinema distribution in Italy - Distribution / Releases / Exhibitors - Italy
items.body: The movie theatre partnership signed between BIM Distribuzione and MUBI Italia under the aegis of Gabriele D’Andrea, will come into effect on 1 August, bringing arthouse films to cinemas

items.hook: Anna Masterton Buchan was a Scottish novelist who wrote under the pen name O.
items.body: Most of her novels were written and set between the wars and portrayed small town or village life in southern Scotland, reflecting her own life. One of those things you can't un-know.
A family gathering takes centre stage in Zvonimir Jurić’s naturalistic and quietly devastating latest feature

items.hook: Cristina Fernández Pintado is filming her third feature film La dona invisible - Production / Funding - Spain
items.body: Mona Martínez, Victoria Oliver, Sílvia Abril, Lorena López, Amparo Fernández and César Tormo star in the detective comedy to be distributed by Film Factory Entertainment

items.hook: ‘The minute I had success, I stopped taking drugs’: John Waters on 60 years of screen carnage
items.body:
As Hairspray and his ‘angriest movie’ Desperate Living are rereleased, the ‘Pope of Trash’ reflects on dead dogs, dirty rats, ‘that lunatic RFK’ and why there are no novelty dances any more

John Waters still remembers the day his 1

items.hook: The 79th Locarno Film Festival unveils the members of its juries - Locarno 2026
items.body: Fabrice Du Welz, Marco Alessi, Lolita Chammah, Paulina García and Olivier Père will serve on the International Competition jury

items.hook: Puerto Rico Highway 157 (PR-157) is a rural road in Puerto Rico that travels from Ciales to Orocovis.
items.body: It begins at its intersection with PR-149 in Toro Negro and ends at its junction with PR-155 near downtown Orocovis. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Drug discovery Is changing. Drug development must change too.
items.body: In this New Scientist CoLab podcast, experts from global life sciences leader Cytiva explain the hidden, high-stakes science of purification that is required to close the gap between drug discovery and the pharmacy shelf.

items.hook: ‘A frightening piece to perform’: can Yoko Ono’s Cut Piece still shock?
items.body:
Sixty years after its first staging, performance artist MPA is restaging the provocative piece in Los Angeles

Yoko Ono: Music of the Mind, a traveli

items.hook: Tulaji Angre, called Tulajee Angria by English historians was the grand admiral of the Maratha Navy and ruler of Colaba State in modern-day India.
items.body: Similar to his famous father Kanhoji Angre, he too was an extremely skilled admiral and attacked several European trading ships. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Jean-Luc Servino is an Italian director, writer, screenwriter and cinematographer, best known in the independent circuits for his shorts, winning several awards, including the Culver City Film Festival, the Eurasia International Film Festival for Best Director and Los Angeles Film Awards for Best Cinematographer.
items.body: Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.
